summary: Comprehensive testing of Criminal Appeals AU app after major changes - iteration 199. All backend APIs passed (13/13 tests). Frontend UI testing verified key features including logo placement, Appellate Research Brief renaming, Scan Document button, Sales & Revenue admin dashboard, and disclaimer wording.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features verified working: 1) Landing page has logo, $5 offer, state badges, 'Appellate Research Brief' text, '41 languages' translation mention, document scanning mention. 2) About page has large logo and founder quote about Josh. 3) Caselaw Search page has logo, red 'Live Search on Caselaw' button, all 8 state abbreviations. 4) Dashboard loads with cases visible. 5) Admin Dashboard shows Sales & Revenue section with total revenue $3,794, total sales 29, breakdown by report tier. 6) Case detail page shows 'SELECT A TAB BELOW TO MANAGE YOUR CASE' heading, Documents tab with 3 buttons (Extract All Text, Upload Document, Scan Document). 7) Reports tab shows 'APPELLATE RESEARCH BRIEF' (correctly renamed from Barrister View), no Quick Brief visible. 8) Backend APIs all working: /api/health, /api/languages (41 languages), /api/analytics/dashboard (with sales data), /api/cases/{id}/translate (background task with polling), /api/cases/{id}/translate/status.

case_detail_page.tab_heading: PASS ('SELECT A TAB BELOW TO MANAGE YOUR CASE')
